span.p:
Path fixed AND outcome
must be identical every time?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Deterministic: Flow or Apex — NOT an agent

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Does reasoning over varied,
unstructured input add real value?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Can the work be expressed as
bounded topics + deterministic actions?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Rescope — too open-ended
for a safe agent
